cmd:
cat > fix.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
sed -i '/^\t\/\/ avatar_url, bio, and location were here in v1 but dropped in v2/d' app/models.go
sed -i '/^.*Role        string    `json:"role"`$/a \\\tAvatarURL   string    `json:\\"avatar_url\\"`\\\n\\\tBio         string    `json:\\"bio\\"`\\\n\\\tLocation    string    `json:\\"location\\"`' app/models.go
EOF

output_preview:

cmd:
cat > fix.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
sed -i 's/\t\/\/ avatar_url, bio, and location were here in v1 but dropped in v2//g' app/models.go
sed -i '/\tRole        string    `json:"role"`/a \tAvatarURL   string    `json:\"avatar_url\"`\n\tBio         string    `json:\"bio\"`\n\tLocation    string    `json:\"location\"`' app/models.go

sed -i 's/\/\/ BUG: Does not include avatar_url, bio, or location because//g' app/models.go
sed -i 's/\/\/ UserV2 struct doesn\'t have those fields.//g' app/models.go
sed
